overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game featuring the character in a white and black suit walking through a wet downtown city street at night. The scene includes pedestrians, traffic, tall skyscrapers, and reflective wet pavement under artificial street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with benches and parked taxis

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the city street between parked cars on the right and sidewalk pedestrians on the left

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a park bench near a tree
yellow taxi parked at the curb with headlights and roof light illuminated

entered.detail: tall dark glass building with illuminated windows rising high above the street
tall brick and glass building with multiple lit windows
row of green USPS mailboxes on the sidewalk
black metal bench with seated pedestrians
yellow taxi cab with illuminated roof light
tall street lamp casting warm orange light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow downtown street flanked by towering skyscrapers. On the left, pedestrians sit on a park bench near green mailboxes, while yellow taxis line the right curb. The wet asphalt reflects the warm glow of street lamps in the cool night air.

events.description: approaching the intersection crosswalk with traffic lights visible ahead
stepping onto the crosswalk and beginning to cross the street alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk while vehicles wait at the red light

notable_agents.action: red delivery van waiting at the crosswalk with headlights on
pedestrian in red jacket crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing stripes on the wet asphalt
traffic signal suspended over the intersection showing red
red commercial van with 'A. FISHER ELECTRIC' text on the side
silver sedan waiting at the intersection behind the van

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide intersection crosswalk, leaving the enclosed street behind. White crosswalk lines mark the wet asphalt as the character crosses alongside other pedestrians. A red delivery van and silver sedan wait at the red traffic light on the right while the character moves from one side of the street to the other.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street continuing past the intersection

events.description: finishing crossing the street and continuing down the next block

agents.ego_description: walking down the next city block passing pedestrians and approaching the next intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: second set of green mailboxes on the sidewalk of the next block
yellow 'BUS STOP' text painted on the street surface
traffic signal at the next intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character continues down the next block of the enclosed downtown street. New green mailboxes appear on the left sidewalk, and a 'BUS STOP' marking is visible on the asphalt. The character approaches another intersection with traffic lights visible in the distance.

events.description: stepping onto the second crosswalk to cross the next intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the second street intersection at the crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: white zebra crossing stripes at the second intersection

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the next intersection and steps onto the second crosswalk. Yellow taxis and other vehicles wait while pedestrians cross the wet street. The white crosswalk lines guide the path across the open intersection area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked downtown corridor that alternates between enclosed city blocks and wide, open intersections. It begins with the character walking down a narrow street flanked by towering skyscrapers, passing pedestrians on park benches and yellow taxis reflecting in the wet asphalt. As the character reaches the end of the block, the scene expands into a wide intersection where they cross white pavement markings alongside other pedestrians while a red delivery van and silver sedan wait at a traffic light. The camera then follows the character back into the enclosure of the next block, passing green mailboxes and a bus stop marking on the street. Finally, the environment opens up once more as the character steps onto a second crosswalk, moving through a crowd of pedestrians past waiting taxis toward the next city intersection.
